ddls:
CREATE TABLE "search_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search term */,
  "term_text" TEXT /* The actual text of the search term */,
  "term_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the search term */,
  "term_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the search term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search term */,
  "search_volume" INTEGER /* The volume of searches for the term */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* The date when the search data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the search data */,
  "location" TEXT /* The geographic location for the search data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_data_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES search_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank entry */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search term */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* The rank of the term based on search volume */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* The date when the rank data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the rank data */,
  "location" TEXT /* The geographic location for the rank data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_ranks_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES search_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES search_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search term the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* The date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report (e.g., monthly trend, predictive analysis) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* The title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* The file path where the report is stored */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* The name of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES search_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search term */,
  "predicted_volume" INTEGER /* The predicted volume of searches for the term */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* The date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* The confidence level of the prediction */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* The algorithm used for making the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* A numerical score representing the confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES search_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report the visualization is associated with */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* The type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar graph) */,
  "viz_file" TEXT /* File path to the visualization image or document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the visualization was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The name of the user who created the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who set the alert */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search term the alert is for */,
  "threshold_volume" INTEGER /* The volume threshold that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES search_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert setting */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* The date when the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the alert (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the alert */,
  "trigger_value" INTEGER /* The actual search volume that triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* The name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search term */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the mapping was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The name of the user who created the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES term_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_category_mapping_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES search_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* The type of market data (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* The value of the market data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* The date when the market data was recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of the market data */,
  "location" TEXT /* The geographic location for the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_market_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search term */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the mapping was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The name of the user who created the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_market_mapping_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES search_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_market_mapping_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("market_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search term related to the article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* The title of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* The date when the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* The URL of the news article */,
  "article_summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_term_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news article */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search term */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date when the mapping was created */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The name of the user who created the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_term_mapping_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_term_mapping_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES search_terms ("term_id")
)
